action.reasoning: Observation: iter 10 eval (iter 9's model) exprate=0.0, exprate_le2=0.0083. Stride-8 ResNet encoder, 4-layer decoder, 30 epochs gave train loss 2.1 but val loss 3.13 and zero exact match. Analysis: model too weak to capture HMER patterns; need higher resolution encoder (stride 4), stronger decoder (6 layers, d_model=512), DenseNet-121 backbone for better feature reuse, and image inversion (white strokes) to align with pretrained weights. Decision: build new model with DenseNet-121 stride-4 encoder, adaptive pool to (16,64), 6-layer decoder (d_model=512, ff=2048, nhead=8), label smoothing 0.1, invert images. Run 5 epochs quick test (expected <15 min) and submit eval to measure improvement before scaling up.
